meta.title: SpykeVision — In-depth projector reviews & measurements
meta.description: Independent, measurement-driven projector reviews. Brightness, contrast, ANSI, ADL and lens testing done right.

hero.heading: Projector reviews, backed by real data.
hero.text: No marketing fluff. Every review is built on real measurements only: brightness, native On/Off & ANSI contrast, color, lens quality and motion. Every number, explained.

comingSoon.title: FScreen Fresnel Screen 120" Gen4 — Review
comingSoon.text: A 4th-gen fixed-frame Fresnel ALR screen for any lighting condition. Full testing: gain, ambient-light rejection, color shift, viewing angles and uniformity.

comingSoon.title: AWOL Aetherion Max — Full Review
comingSoon.text: Retail unit in for testing. Lab workup: brightness output, native / ANSI / ADL contrast, anti-RBE and EBL efficiency, lens sharpness and geometry.

whyCards.title: Real lumens
whyCards.text: Real luminous output measured across every zoom and aperture position, in manufacturer-calibrated modes.

whyCards.title: Native, ANSI & ADL
whyCards.text: On/off, checkerboard ANSI, and full ADL curves across the full range — the metrics that actually predict black-level performance.

whyCards.title: Lens & geometry
whyCards.text: Sharpness, distortion, uniformity and lens-shift behavior, tested at the extremes.
